titles.title: Heaven Came Down and Glory Filled My Soul

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O what a wonderful, wonderful day Day I will never forget After I’d wandered in darkness away Jesus my Saviour I met O what a tender, compassionate friend He met the need of my heart Shadows dispelling, with joy I am telling He made all the darkness depart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Heaven came down and glory filled my soul (filled my soul) When at the cross my Saviour made me whole (made me whole) My sins were washed away And my night was turned to day Heaven came down and glory filled my soul

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Born of the Spirit with life from above Into God’s family divine Justified fully through Calvary’s love O what a standing is mine And the transaction so quickly was made When as a sinner I came Took of the offer of grace He did proffer He saved me, O praise His dear name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now I’ve a hope that will surely endure After the passing of time I have a future in heaven for sure There in those mansions sublime And it’s because of that wonderful day When at the cross I believed Riches eternal and blessings supernal From His precious hand I received
